Fixed header should stay pinned while scrolling.
Sticky sidebar should remain aligned beneath the header.

Scroll block 1. Serenity applies a root filter, which can affect containing-block behavior on some pages.

Scroll block 2. Verify the fixed header does not jump or detach.

Scroll block 3. Verify the sticky sidebar continues to stick.

Scroll block 4. Long content keeps the page scrollable.

Scroll block 5. End of fixture.
